mainEntity.name: Which companies are part of ARKON Group?

acceptedAnswer.text: ARKON Group consists of ARKON Engineering Consultancy Co., ELITE Security Consultancy Co., Integrated Building Systems, Quality Inspection Company, and Turning Point Digital Marketing Co.

mainEntity.name: What services does ARKON Group cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: ARKON Group covers engineering consultancy, security consultancy, construction and technical works, quality inspection and testing, and digital marketing services.

mainEntity.name: Does ARKON Group serve projects in Saudi Arabia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. ARKON Group is positioned for project support across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
